project_privacy_data_flows.data_type: All Local User Data, Session Token
project_privacy_data_flows.description: User logs out. All local storage cleared: encrypted database, MMKV stores, biometric credentials, and settings. Optional backup before logout.

flow_steps.details: User initiates logout. Options: local only, or full account logout.
Optional automatic backup before logout to prevent data loss.
Server session terminated. Auth token invalidated.

flow_steps.code: BiometricService.resetCredentials(); MMKV.clearStore(); resetTabStore(); clearAllStores(); SettingsService.resetSettings(); db.reset();
flow_steps.details: All local data cleared: MMKV storage, biometric credentials, tab state, all stores, settings, and database reset.
